headline: How APA’s Suriname Block 58 Focus and Digital Push At APA (APA) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: On March 25, 2026, APA Corporation presented at the 5th Annual Connected Worker: Energy Summit in Houston, where Director of IT Applications Lisa Cruz discussed the company’s digital and workforce technologies. The renewed attention on APA’s Suriname offshore Block 58, highlighted as a low-cost, large-scale oil project, is sharpening investor interest in the company’s longer-term asset potential. Against this backdrop, we’ll explore how APA’s Suriname Block 58 opportunity influences its...
